use_cases: Collapsible FAQ sections for websites and applications
Organizing privacy policies and terms of service content
Displaying expandable product details or specifications
Creating structured documentation or help center layouts
ai_summary: An accessible accordion component built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS. Features smooth expand/collapse animations with a rotating chevron indicator and hover underline states. Clean, minimalist design suitable for FAQ sections and content organization across various industries.
